name: chr20_20p11_23_PAX1_SD
description: 20p11.22 SD region containing PAX1 (paired-box transcription factor, otofaciocervical syndrome gene), FOXA2 and SNAP25. Flanked by short SDs (~10-30 kb) and embedded in the proximal-20p SD field.

architecture.internal_structure: Short 10-30 kb intra-chromosomal SDs at 93-97% identity flanking PAX1, FOXA2; partial inter-chromosomal SDs to other PAX family loci.
